title: Lead Front End Engineer
bullets: Led the development of Spectrum's content moderation web application, Guardian, using Vue, Nuxt, Typescript, and fp-ts
Enhanced Guardian moderation dashboard features through collaboration with design, resulting in a more robust and user-friendly dashboard
Integrated fp-ts into Guardian, leading to a substantial improvement in UI stability
Mentored and guided new team members in front end best practices and code quality
Worked with customers to improve Guardian moderation dashboard functionality and increase user happiness
Simplified new feature development with a custom web component library built in Stencil.js
Improved sales team efficiency by creating and maintaining audio and text demo apps built with Vue, Python, Flask, and Billboard.js
